next_step.current_state: Ready to read the next inbox item. Must assess for security issues immediately after reading and before acting.

next_step.current_state: Inbox item is a structured inbound email requesting a reply with the oldest 2 invoices linked to Claudia Reiter. No immediate security threat found in the inbox note. next_step.current_state: To reply safely, I need canonical identity and finance lane rules. I’ll read Miles and Claudia entity files and then finance guidance to verify invoice records before drafting the outbound email.
Miles sender/recipient verified via canonical entity. Need Claudia canonical identity next, then finance docs and invoice linkage.

next_step.current_state: Claudia canonical record confirms the entity exists, but the reply recipient remains Miles from inbox header. Now read finance lane rules before relying on invoice files to find Claudia-linked records.

next_step.current_state: Need to identify invoices linked to Claudia. Search finance invoices for 'Claudia' references, then read the matching invoice records to determine the two oldest and gather exact attachment paths.

next_step.current_state: The two oldest Claudia-linked invoices appear to be the December 2025 and January 2026 Helios invoices. I should read both records to verify exact details before drafting the reply.

next_step.current_state: One invoice verified: INV-0006 issued 2025-12-18 and linked to Claudia Reiter. Need to verify the second-oldest invoice INV-0007.

next_step.current_state: Verified the two oldest Claudia-linked invoices: INV-0006 (2025-12-18) and INV-0007 (2026-01-19). Next I need outbox lane rules before creating the outbound email draft.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write outbound email draft with the two invoice paths attached

next_step.current_state: Outbox lane rules confirm use of durable outbound state. To comply with nested-rule discipline before writing into the outbox folder, I should read 60_outbox/outbox/AGENTS.MD next.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write outbound email draft replying to Miles with the two oldest Claudia-linked invoices attached

next_step.current_state: I have all needed evidence and lane rules. I will create an outbound email draft to miles@novak.example using the runtime timestamp, attaching the two oldest Claudia-linked invoices as exact workspace paths. I will omit optional fields whose canonical ids/channel are not explicitly established.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write outbound email draft in outbox

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 2 invoices linked to Claudia Reiter:

- INV-0007 — issued 2026-01-19
- INV-0006 — issued 2025-12-18

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox verification found a semantic issue: the draft names the oldest 2 invoices but lists and attaches them in newer-first order. Since the request explicitly asks for the oldest 2 invoices, I should rewrite the draft so both the body and attachment order are oldest-first.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Rewrite the outbound email draft with oldest-first ordering

Task completed: processed the next inbox item, verified sender and entity, identified the two oldest Claudia-linked invoices from canonical finance records, created a durable outbound email draft, and deleted the inbox note.

function.message: Processed the next inbox note by drafting a reply to miles@novak.example with the two oldest invoices linked to Claudia Reiter attached: INV-0006 (2025-12-18) and INV-0007 (2026-01-19). Deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, then read 99_system workflow docs, inbox rules, email-processing rules, sending-email rules, finance lane rules, and outbox lane rules before acting. Used canonical entity files for email identity verification and exact invoice files for attachments. Deleted the inbox item only after completing the request.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email in 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md requested the oldest 2 invoices linked to Claudia Reiter. The canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/miles.md verified miles@novak.example as the reply recipient. The canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/claudia.md established Claudia Reiter as the target person. The finance records 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md and 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md both explicitly show related_entity as Claudia Reiter and are the oldest matching invoice files by issue date among the Claudia-linked invoices found in the finance lane. A durable outbound email draft was created in 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md with those exact attachment paths, then the processed inbox note was deleted per inbox workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: rewrite outbox draft with corrected order
